problem id: 1d5ad68a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND SHL(3)

examples:
  11100001 -> 00000000
  00010000 -> 00000000
  10110111 -> 10011000
  01000001 -> 00000000
  00101111 -> 00010000
  11110100 -> 00100000
  01110001 -> 10001000
  10001100 -> 01000000
  10001111 -> 01000000

query: 10000110
predicted answer: 00000000
